# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enable"

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-control-plane
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: linkerd
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: linkerd
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: linkerd-control-plane
        image: linkerd/linkerd2:v2.14.0
        command:
        - linkerd
        - control-plane
        - install
        - kube-controller-manager
        ports:
        - containerPort: 4140
          name: linkerd-cp
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 4140
        volumeMounts:
        - name: config-volume
          mountPath: /config
      volumes:
      - name: config-volume
        configMap:
          name: linkerd-cm
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2beta2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: linkerd-control-plane
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: linkerd-control-plane
  minReplicas: 2
  maxReplicas: 4
  metrics:
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: cpu
      targetAverageUtilization: 80

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceMesh
metadata:
  name: mesh
spec:
  tracers:
    jaeger: {}
  telemetries:
    prometheus: {}

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-policy
spec:
  selectors: []
  outlierDetection:
    initialPeriod: "30s"
    interval: "1m"
  trafficShifting:
    failureRatio: "5%"
    requestVolumeThreshold: "5"
    abortNewServiceOverridesAfter: "12h"
  tcp: {}

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServicePolicy
metadata:
  name: service-policy-microservice1
spec:
  selectors:
    - matchLabelSelector:
        labelKey: app
        labelValue: microservice1
  tracers:
    jaeger: {}
  telemetries:
    prometheus: {}
  tcp: {}
  http:
    tls: {}
    outlierDetection:
      initialPeriod: "30s"
      interval: "1m"
    trafficShifting:
      failureRatio: "5%"
      requestVolumeThreshold: "5"
      abortNewServiceOverridesAfter: "12h"
